anth-ethnographic.label: Ethnographic Requirement
anth-ethnographic.note: Two courses covering regional and thematic ethnography

anth-theoretical.label: Theoretical Requirement
anth-theoretical.note: Two courses in theory, human rights, applied anthropology, or religion

anth-archaeology.label: Archaeology Requirement
anth-archaeology.note: One archaeology course (Mesoamerican, North American, Historical Archaeology, etc.)

anth-bio.label: Bio-Anthropology Requirement
anth-bio.note: One course: Human Evolution, Primatology, Human Osteology, or Dental Anthropology

anth-electives.label: Additional Anthropology Electives
anth-electives.note: Three additional ANTH courses (at least two at 200/300-level)
